summary: Decent audience recording captures a solid second‑half Dark Star from an underrated Dover Lake show.
review: The reviewer remembers the concert as a "pretty good stretch" and highlights the second half of the Dark Star as a memorable moment. No specific comments are made about the audio, but the Sennheiser 441 source suggests a single‑mic audience tape of average clarity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; strong positive sentiment about the performance but no concrete data on recording quality, so rating leans toward a good show with an assumed fair audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments; Senn441 mic indicates likely a single‑mic audience capture with typical ambient noise and limited mix detail.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer recalls the concert as a solid stretch, especially noting the strength of the latter portion of Dark Star.
